items.title: Remove 'Go to your Library' link in welcome window
items.detail: The welcome screen has a 'Go to your Library' link/button. Remove it.
items.notes: Removed button and handler. Language picker moved to bottom-left of right panel.

items.title: Globe icon for language selector: improve readability
items.detail: Globe icon (language picker) is hard to read. Replace icon with a more legible alternative and/or change its color to blue to make it stand out.
items.notes: Welcome screen: Segoe Fluent Icons F2B7 glyph, AccentBrush tint. Status bar globe not yet updated.

items.title: Remove hamburger toggle from nav rail
items.detail: The hamburger/collapse toggle at the top of the nav rail should be removed. The rail should always be visible at a fixed width, no collapse behavior.
items.notes: Removed button and _sidebarCollapsed field from code-behind. NavColumn width set to fixed 50.

items.title: Remove 'T' logo from nav rail
items.detail: The T/logo glyph at the top of the nav rail should be removed entirely.
items.notes: Removed T TextBlock from nav rail top StackPanel

items.title: Replace 'TMM —' text in titlebar with app icon
items.detail: Title bar currently shows 'TMM — [Page Name]'. Replace the blue 'TMM' text and the hyphen separator with the app icon (small, ~16–20px). No hyphens.
items.notes: Replaced 'TMM' text with Segoe MDL2  glyph (wrench icon, 16px, AccentBrush). Format: [icon] [Page Name]

items.title: [VERIFY] Enable window resizing
items.detail: Window edges should be draggable. Needs visual test in running app.
items.notes: Low-level window behavior; verify edge dragging works

items.title: [VERIFY] Restrict address bar width in Downloads tab
items.detail: WebView2 address bar should not span full width if visible.
items.notes: Browser-specific; visual inspection needed

items.title: [VERIFY] Dark mode scrollbars + centering
items.detail: Custom dark scrollbar styling; check Library/Notifications don't drift left when scrollbar visible.
items.notes: Visual regression risk; centered UI elements should stay centered

items.title: Library home view refinements
items.detail: Prettiness + metrics pass. Additional stats on cards/stat row; 'Your games' filtered to configured games only.
items.notes: Stats: 'Games with folder' + 'Last deployed' replacing old tiles. Your games panel empty-state hint added. Hero only shows configured games.

items.title: Move Troubleshooting above Settings in nav rail; rename to 'Troubleshooting & Help'
items.detail: Current rail order (bottom): Help & Troubleshooting, Settings. New order: Troubleshooting & Help (above Settings), Settings (bottom). Also rename the rail entry to 'Troubleshooting & Help'.
items.notes: Moved navBtnTroubleshooting button to bottom DockPanel above Settings. Updated tooltip to 'Troubleshooting & Help'.

items.title: Split Settings into dual-pane view to eliminate scrolling
items.detail: Settings page currently requires scrolling. Redesign as a dual-pane layout: left pane is a category list (General, Appearance, Paths, etc.), right pane shows the selected category's controls. No full-page scroll needed.
items.notes: Architectural change to SettingsPage.xaml. Consider categories: General / Appearance / File Paths / Advanced.

items.title: [VERIFY] Ghost checkbox artifact on hover
items.detail: Old template had hover-state ghost checkbox. M2 redesign removed it; needs visual confirmation.
items.notes: Cosmetic regression; hover mod rows to verify no ghost checkbox appears

items.title: [VERIFY] Character encoding in deployment notification
items.detail: Non-English character artifact reported in deployment toast. Needs live observation during deploy with es-MX locale or character-heavy mod names.
items.notes: Deploy a mod and check toast notification rendering; switch to es-MX and re-test

items.title: Deployment Plan Editor (PlanEditorWindow)
items.detail: New UI for file routing: left pane (game directory tree with conflict annotations), right pane (mod source files with destination per file), drag-to-reassign, footer conflict count. Replaces flat DeployPreviewWindow.
items.notes: Not yet implemented; required for better user control over routing decisions

items.title: [CRITICAL VERIFY] Cold-start walkthrough
items.detail: Factory reset → library → set game folder → browse Downloads → install mod → deploy → verify game launches. Full end-to-end test.
items.notes: Must run before any public release. Catches issues tests cannot (missing files, toast encoding, first-run UX gaps).

items.title: Module-size audit: flag files over ~800 lines
items.detail: ModManagerPage.xaml.cs is at 1055 lines. Recommend splitting into additional partials (Filter, Sorting, DragDrop, ContextMenu).
items.notes: Code health; low priority vs feature work

items.title: VFS feasibility assessment
items.detail: High complexity; recommend deferred indefinitely. Current direct-deploy + plan freeze covers primary use case.
items.notes: Post-v1 decision; analysis complete

items.title: Nexus Mods API integration feasibility
items.detail: Feasible via REST API. Key mgmt in Settings. Full integration is post-v1.
items.notes: Post-v1 decision; analysis complete

items.title: FOMOD installer schema feasibility
items.detail: Feasible. Recommend after install-preview (PlanEditorWindow) is complete.
items.notes: Post-v1 decision; analysis complete

items.title: Single-layer undo for deploy actions
items.detail: Feasible via existing backup system. Surface as toast action button expiring after 30s.
items.notes: Post-v1 decision; analysis complete
